package com.openmacro.core.engine.action

import android.content.Context
import android.media.AudioManager
import com.openmacro.core.engine.ExecutionContext
import com.openmacro.core.model.ActionConfig
import com.openmacro.core.model.config.SetVolumeConfig
import kotlinx.serialization.json.Json
import javax.inject.Inject

class SetVolumeHandler @Inject constructor() : ActionHandler {
    override val actionTypeId = "set_volume"

    override suspend fun execute(config: ActionConfig, context: ExecutionContext) {
        val parsed = Json.decodeFromString<SetVolumeConfig>(config.configJson)
        val am = context.androidContext.getSystemService(Context.AUDIO_SERVICE) as AudioManager

        val maxVolume = am.getStreamMaxVolume(parsed.streamType)
        val targetVolume = (parsed.level * maxVolume / 100).coerceIn(0, maxVolume)

        am.setStreamVolume(parsed.streamType, targetVolume, 0)
    }
}

Write 4 ActionHandlers in a SINGLE file. Package: com.openmacro.core.engine.action

1. ScreenOnOffActionHandler:
   - actionTypeId = "screen_on_off"
   - Config: ScreenOnOffActionConfig with turnOn (Boolean, default true)
   - If turnOn: acquire a FULL_WAKE_LOCK PowerManager.WakeLock briefly to turn screen on
   - If !turnOn: use DevicePolicyManager to lock the screen (context.androidContext.getSystemService(Context.DEVICE_POLICY_SERVICE) as DevicePolicyManager).lockNow()
   - Note: lockNow() requires device admin — log warning if SecurityException

2. ForceScreenRotationHandler:
   - actionTypeId = "force_screen_rotation"
   - Config: ForceScreenRotationConfig with rotation (Int, default 0: 0=natural, 1=90, 2=180, 3=270)
   - Use Settings.System.putInt(contentResolver, Settings.System.USER_ROTATION, parsed.rotation)
   - Also set Settings.System.ACCELEROMETER_ROTATION to 0 to disable auto-rotate

3. AutoRotateHandler:
   - actionTypeId = "auto_rotate"
   - Config: AutoRotateConfig with enable (Boolean, default true)
   - Use Settings.System.putInt(contentResolver, Settings.System.ACCELEROMETER_ROTATION, if (parsed.enable) 1 else 0)

4. DarkThemeHandler:
   - actionTypeId = "dark_theme"
   - Config: DarkThemeConfig with enable (Boolean, default true)
   - Use UiModeManager.setNightMode(if (parsed.enable) UiModeManager.MODE_NIGHT_YES else UiModeManager.MODE_NIGHT_NO)
   - Get UiModeManager via context.androidContext.getSystemService(Context.UI_MODE_SERVICE) as UiModeManager

Each handler: @Inject constructor(), implements ActionHandler, decodes config from config.configJson.
